meta.node_ordering_rule: list(g.nodes()) insertion order; canonical fixtures use explicit node_names; random fixtures use X_0..X_{n-1}
meta.notes: All graphs are post-mark_and_collapse_bidirected_edges. Bidirected fixtures intentionally excluded (0.1.x collapses them to undirected, which is a v0.2 semantic break).
